nasb.text: Joseph hurried out for he was deeply stirred over his brother, and he sought a place to weep; and he entered his chamber and wept there.

esv.text: Then Joseph hurried out, for his compassion grew warm for his brother, and he sought a place to weep. And he entered his chamber and wept there.

cnv.text: 約瑟愛弟弟之情激動起來，就急忙去找個可哭的地方。於是他進了自己的內室，在那裡哭了一陣。

ccb.text: 约瑟爱弟之心油然而生，急忙出去找哭的地方。他到自己的房间里哭了一场。

csbs.text: 约瑟的爱弟之情升腾，他就急忙找个地方去哭。于是他进到自己的内室，在那里哭了一场。
